rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope when binding implementation-level details, and into component type scope for port-level assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component type and implementation boundaries when inserting AGREE annexes.
Ensure all referenced ports and features are visible and correctly typed in the target scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE contracts, and align variable types with AADL data types.
Reference only ports and features declared in the AADL model, not properties or subcomponent paths in component type scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless mapped through visible features.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement strategy for non-target components
